summary: Frontend-only testing of Shopping tab (Grocery List) features. Supabase grocery_items table does NOT exist yet — all DB-dependent tests blocked. All non-DB UI tests PASS. App handles missing table gracefully (no visible errors, shows empty state).

integration_issues.issue: Supabase grocery_items table does not exist. Adding items fails with 404 from Supabase REST API. All item-dependent tests blocked: category headers, bottom nav badge, checkbox, swipe-delete, undo snackbar, qty edit, note edit, CategoryPicker, reset with items.

passing_tests: Empty state 'Einkaufsliste ist leer' shows with friendly message
Add item input has correct placeholder 'Artikel hinzufügen…'
Shopping mode toggle shows 'Einkaufen' by default
Clicking shopping mode toggle changes to 'Fertig' with user blue color (rgb(59,130,246))
Reset button (RotateCcw) is correctly disabled when no items
App handles missing Supabase table gracefully — no error messages shown to user
shopping-mode-toggle, reset-list-button, add-item-input, add-item-button all have correct data-testid attributes
blocked_tests_require_db_setup: Add 'Äpfel' — item appears under 🥦 Obst & Gemüse category header
Add 'Milch' — item appears under 🥛 Milch & Alternativen category header
Add 'Chips' — item appears under 🍫 Snacks & Süsses category header
Bottom nav Shopping badge shows red unchecked count
Unchecked count badge decreases after checking
Shopping mode: checked items appear at bottom
Category badge tap — CategoryPicker bottom sheet
action_items: CRITICAL: Run SQL from /app/supabase_grocery_setup.sql in Supabase Dashboard (SQL Editor) to create grocery_items table. All 18+ item-dependent tests are blocked until this is done.
After table creation, retest all item CRUD flows (add, check, delete, undo, qty edit, notes, CategoryPicker, reset)
critical_code_review_comments: Supabase grocery_items table missing — needs manual SQL setup before any item functionality works. The setup SQL file exists at /app/supabase_grocery_setup.sql

success_rate.frontend: 45% (8/18 features testable without DB; all 8 pass. 18 features require DB table that doesn't exist)

seed_data_creation: None — Supabase grocery_items table does not exist, cannot create items
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shopping tab non-DB UI tests all pass. The only blocker is the missing Supabase grocery_items table (confirmed 404 on /rest/v1/grocery_items). Main agent must run /app/supabase_grocery_setup.sql in Supabase Dashboard first. Once done, test the full item CRUD flow: add Äpfel/Milch/Chips, verify category headers, check items, verify badge, swipe delete, undo, qty/note editing, CategoryPicker, reset dialog. Shopping mode toggle works correctly (blue color #3B82F6 when active, shows 'Fertig'). All data-testid attributes are present and correct.
rca_of_issue: The Supabase grocery_items table was never created. The app frontend (GroceryContext.js) tries to query/insert to this table which returns HTTP 404 from PostgREST. The app silently swallows the error and shows empty state. SQL to fix: /app/supabase_grocery_setup.sql must be run in Supabase Dashboard SQL Editor.
